summary: First test iteration. Backend tested with pytest (13 passed, 1 skipped). All auth/resume/interview/dashboard endpoints functional. LLM integration (GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations) works for resume analysis, question generation and answer evaluation. Streak increments correctly after first evaluate. Frontend login -> dashboard works, sidebar navigation across Dashboard/Resume/Interview/Compare works, theme toggle works, Resume Analyzer page renders correctly, Mock Interview /new page renders with role/difficulty selectors and Start Interview button. Logout button present (visible 'LOGOUT' text) but missing data-testid.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button has no data-testid; only text 'LOGOUT' available. Add data-testid="logout-btn" for testability.

issues: Console warning: ResponsiveContainer reports width(-1) and height(-1). Likely chart container has 0 height when no data is selected. Add minHeight or aspect to ResponsiveContainer.

action_items: Add data-testid="logout-btn" to Sidebar logout button for E2E testability
Fix recharts ResponsiveContainer sizing warning on Compare page (set minHeight or wrap container with explicit height)
Optional: add data-testid attributes to nav links (nav-dashboard, nav-resume, nav-interview, nav-compare) and theme-toggle for stable selectors
critical_code_review_comments: interview_routes.py and resume_routes.py use 'from server import db' inside endpoints, causing circular import indirection. Prefer Depends-injected db (request.app.state.db is already set).
models.ResumeAnalyzeRequest is defined but unused; resume/analyze uses Form fields directly. Safe to remove.
auth.py reads JWT_SECRET at import time without fallback: if env missing, app crashes at import. Acceptable per fail-fast convention.
interview.evaluate stores raw answer text without length cap; could grow large documents. Consider trimming.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 executed; 1 skipped due to insufficient prior data)

seed_data_creation: Created one new signup user testuser_<random>@prepstack.dev and one fresh interview session for test.user@prepstack.dev via evaluate flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses session-scoped fixtures; runs in ~30s. LLM endpoints (/resume/analyze, /interview/generate, /interview/evaluate) need timeout >= 120s. Compare test auto-skips when user has <2 interviews. Use existing test user to avoid duplicate-email failure during signup. Frontend logout button lacks data-testid; locate via text 'LOGOUT' inside sidebar.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. Recharts warning on Compare page caused by ResponsiveContainer rendering before chart data dimensions are available; mitigation is to add explicit minHeight to the container wrapper.
